overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character running through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban intersection at night, transitioning to high-speed vehicle travel through futuristic city streets. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, and a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with dominant magenta and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: character transitions from standing to sprinting across the crosswalk
futuristic black sedan passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: sprinting across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward the hotel district

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on
pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk corner near the wide open sign

entered.detail: large cylindrical building with multiple rotating holographic advertisement screens
large pink digital billboard displaying 'wide open' text with graphics
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection at night, dominated by a large cylindrical building with rotating holographic billboards. The character begins sprinting across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk as a black futuristic sedan passes through. Neon signs illuminate the wet pavement, creating colorful reflections, while the 'wide open' digital sign glows prominently on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon hotel signage and ground floor shops

events.description: character turns left while running to follow the street past the hotel
white futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: running along the commercial street and turning left past the neon hotel sign

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk in the opposite direction
white futuristic car with glowing accents driving along the street

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'HOTEL' with Japanese characters 'ホテル' below
multi-story commercial building with illuminated ground floor shop windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues running past a prominent pink neon hotel sign with Japanese text, turning left along a commercial street lined with shops. The cylindrical billboard building recedes into the background on the right while pedestrians and a white futuristic vehicle share the street. The environment remains densely urban with neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with modern red-accented commercial buildings

events.description: character makes a sharp right turn around the corner of the red building
dark sedan passes through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: rounding the corner near the wide open building while maintaining running speed

notable_agents.action: dark sedan with red taillights driving through the intersection ahead
pedestrian walking on the sidewalk near the wide open digital sign

entered.detail: contemporary building with prominent red structural beams and glass facade
tall street light poles with vertical cyan neon lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The character navigates around a corner featuring a modern building with distinctive red structural beams, passing the 'wide open' digital sign again as it comes into closer view. The cylindrical billboard building rotates back into the center of the frame while the character avoids vehicles and pedestrians in the intersection. Neon street poles with cyan lighting line the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: major arterial road through downtown with towering corporate skyscrapers

events.description: abrupt transition from running to high-speed vehicle travel along multi-lane avenue
vehicle stops at red traffic light at major intersection

agents.ego_description: speeding down the multi-lane avenue in a vehicle, passing through intersections with neon-lit skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving in the adjacent lane with glowing undercarriage
pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk for the light to change

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway with red structural supports spanning across the road
tall corporate office tower with large blue neon 'DATA INC' signage near the top
large vertical digital billboard displaying red samurai mask graphic with Japanese text
cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and vertical neon accents

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to high-speed vehicle travel down a major arterial road lined with towering glass skyscrapers. The vehicle passes under a red pedestrian bridge and approaches the 'DATA INC' building with its prominent blue neon signage. The road features multiple lanes with red and yellow markings, and the scene is dominated by vertical neon signs including a large red samurai mask billboard. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light surrounded by the dense urban canyon of corporate towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a frantic foot chase through a neon-lit intersection to a high-speed drive through a corporate urban canyon. It begins with a character sprinting across a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a rotating cylindrical billboard, where vibrant neon signs cast colorful reflections onto the rain-slicked pavement. As the character turns left past a pink hotel sign and navigates around a building with red structural beams, the camera weaves through pedestrians and vehicles while the cylindrical tower looms in the background. The perspective then shifts dramatically from a pedestrian pace to high-speed vehicle travel, accelerating down a major arterial road lined with towering glass skyscrapers and cyan street poles. The scene finally culminates as the vehicle passes under a red pedestrian bridge and glides past a massive samurai mask billboard before coming to a halt at a red light beneath the blue glow of the DATA INC building.
